title: Vazhkkai Unnai Lyrics Pulivaal Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Song: Vazhkkai Unnai
Singer(s): Harihara Sudhan
Movie: Pulivaal
Music : N.R.Raghurathan

Vazhakai unnai odavidum
varaimurai indri aadavidum
Neenda dhooram odiya pinney
nenju koodu vaadiyapinney
thappaana thisaiendru thagaval tharum.

Dhooram kadandhu vandhaal thaaney
oorai sera mudiyum.
Uyarama thaandi vandhaal thaaney
thuyaram thaanda mudiyum. ....(Vazhakai unnai)

Vidhaigal thammai alikkaamal
vergal enbadhu kidayaadhu.
Viyarvai enbadhai ilakkaamal
vettri enbadhu kidayaadhu.

Thaedi ponadhu veru nee
thaedi adaivadhu veru.
Yedho ondrai adayumpodhu
yedhuvo thozhaiyum paaru.

Manidhan podum kanakkil
ellaaam sariyum thavarum undu
kaalam podum kanakil ellaam
sarigal mattumey undu.

unadhu kanakkum kaalakkanukkum
othu ponaal nandru. .....(Vazhakai unnai )

NItham kutram puriginraai
ninaithukooda magizhkindraai.
ellaa kannum thoonguvadhaai
innoru kuttram ilaikindrai.

Paavam enbadhu un kuppai
adhu nitham serum paaru.
paavakuppai ellaam kooti
payirukku uramaai podu.

Karumbu kattil yaanai pugundhaal
yedhuvum illai mitcham.
yaanai kadhil erumbu nulaindhaal
adhuve thuyarin utchcham.

Madiyil kanamey illai enndraal
vazhil yedhu atchcham....(Vazhakai unnai )

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Vazhkkai Unnai'?

The song 'Vazhkkai Unnai' explores themes of longing and emotional connection, reflecting on the complexities of relationships.

What is the context of this song in the movie Pulivaal?

In the movie Pulivaal, this song underscores a pivotal moment of emotional conflict, enhancing the narrative's depth.

Who is the singer and music director of this song?

The song is sung by Hariharasudhan and composed by N. R. Raghunanthan.

When was 'Vazhkkai Unnai' released?

'Vazhkkai Unnai' was released on January 6, 2014.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In 'Vazhkkai Unnai', the listener is taken on an emotional journey that reflects the struggles of love and longing. The song's soothing melody and poignant lyrics evoke a sense of nostalgia and melancholy, making it a perfect fit for moments of introspection. Set against the backdrop of the movie Pulivaal, it captures the essence of heartache and the complexities of relationships. This heartfelt composition resonates deeply, leaving a lasting impression on its audience.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Vazhkkai Unnai from the Pulivaal movie is a hauntingly beautiful melody that resonates with the depths of longing and introspection. With Hariharasudhan's soulful voice and N. R. Raghunanthan's evocative composition, this song captures the essence of emotional turmoil. Dive into the lyrical journey that speaks to the heart and soul, making it a must-listen for anyone who appreciates poignant music.
stanzaMeanings: Life will give you the strength to overcome challenges and will guide you in the right direction.
When you cross distances, you can connect with places. When you rise above, you can find peace.
Destinies cannot be changed by others. Success cannot be achieved without effort.
Searching for something is different from finding it. When you capture something, observe it carefully.
In human calculations, there are always mistakes. In the right calculations, there are only correct answers.
When your calculations and actions align, it is good.
You are always aware of your faults, and thinking about them makes you happy. All your eyes are closed to another fault.
The poor thing is your garbage; it always accumulates. Gather all the waste and use it for growth.
When an elephant enters a sugarcane field, nothing is left behind. When the elephant is trapped, it becomes a source of pain.
If there is no clarity in the mind, what is the point of the path?
